event_title: Join us at the ACM Data Science Camp, 10/24 at PayPal, N San Jose
title: Join us at the ACM Data Science Camp, 10/24 at PayPal, N San Jose
description: Come to our Unconference, invite your members, propose sessions like your meetup (to attract others to your group). We have 4 time slots and 6+ rooms for 24+ meetups. We have a keynote on Spark /MLlib from Databricks, and an "intro to data mining in R” class. Our SFbayACM meetup group has two talks a month: general computing and data science SIG. See also our www.SFbayACM.org site, and our youtube channel (SFbayACM). http://sfbayacm.org/event/silicon-valley-data-science-camp-2015
